mapper.sql: select v.variable_id, v.scene_id, v.group_id, s.scene_code, s.scene_name, s.business_domain, g.group_code, g.group_name, v.variable_code, v.variable_name, v.variable_type, v.source_type, v.source_system, v.dict_type, v.remote_api, v.request_method, v.content_type, v.query_config_json, v.request_headers_json, v.body_template_json, v.auth_type, v.auth_config_json, v.data_path, v.response_config_json, v.mapping_config_json, v.page_config_json, v.adapter_type, v.adapter_config_json, v.sync_mode, v.cache_policy, v.fallback_policy, v.formula_expr, v.formula_code, fm.formula_name, fm.business_formula, v.data_type, v.default_value, v.precision_scale, v.status, v.sort_no, v.remark, v.create_by, v.create_time, v.update_by, v.update_time from cost_variable v left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = v.scene_id left join cost_variable_group g on g.group_id = v.group_id left join cost_formula fm on fm.scene_id = v.scene_id and fm.formula_code = v.formula_code

where.if: and ( v.variable_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or v.variable_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: order by s.scene_name asc, g.sort_no asc, v.sort_no asc, v.variable_id asc
order by s.scene_name asc, g.sort_no asc, v.sort_no asc, v.variable_id asc

select count(1) as variableCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as enabledVariableCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.source_type = 'REMOTE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as remoteVariableCount, coalesce(sum(case when v.source_type = 'FORMULA' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as formulaVariableCount from cost_variable v left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = v.scene_id left join cost_variable_group g on g.group_id = v.group_id

select v.variable_id as variableId, v.scene_id as sceneId, s.scene_code as sceneCode, s.scene_name as sceneName, v.variable_code as variableCode, v.variable_name as variableName, v.status as status, v.source_type as sourceType, v.formula_code as formulaCode, fm.formula_name as formulaName, (select count(1) from cost_fee_variable_rel rel where rel.variable_id = v.variable_id) as feeRelCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule_condition cond where cond.scene_id = v.scene_id and cond.variable_code = v.variable_code) as ruleConditionCount, (select count(1) from cost_rule r where r.scene_id = v.scene_id and r.quantity_variable_code = v.variable_code) as ruleQuantityCount, (select count(1) from cost_publish_snapshot snap join cost_publish_version ver on ver.version_id = snap.version_id where ver.scene_id = v.scene_id and snap.snapshot_type = 'VARIABLE' and snap.object_code = v.variable_code) as publishedVersionCount from cost_variable v left join cost_scene s on s.scene_id = v.scene_id left join cost_formula fm on fm.scene_id = v.scene_id and fm.formula_code = v.formula_code where v.variable_id = #{variableId}

select count(1) from cost_variable where source_type = 'REMOTE'
and scene_id = #{sceneId}
